nasb.text: The four wheels were underneath the borders, and the axles of the wheels were on the stand. And the height of a wheel was a cubit and a half.

esv.text: And the four wheels were underneath the panels. The axles of the wheels were of one piece with the stands, and the height of a wheel was a cubit and a half.

cnv.text: 盆座的四個輪子是在盆邊的下面，輪座與軸相接，每個輪子高六十六公分。

ccb.text: 下面有四个七十厘米高的轮子，轮轴固定在盆座上。
